results.query: migrate all vllm instances to a new GPU server

arguments.reason: This is a multi-step infrastructure migration involving multiple vllm instances (vllm-35b, vllm-8b, vllm-4b, vllm-vlm) across different nodes. Migration requires: provisioning or configuring the new GPU server, moving model files and configurations, updating service endpoints, coordinating network/firewall changes, and ensuring zero-downtime transition. This needs human oversight to define the target server, migration plan, rollback strategy, and coordinate the changes across the cluster.

results.query: set up a new OpenClaw instance for a third user

arguments.reason: Setting up a new OpenClaw instance involves provisioning a new service, configuring ports/DNS, and integrating with the existing infrastructure. This requires coordination to ensure proper configuration, avoid port conflicts, and set up any necessary authentication or routing. Human oversight is needed to determine the appropriate configuration for the third user.

results.query: reconfigure Caddy to add a new domain with TLS

arguments.command: cat /etc/caddy/Caddyfile 2>/dev/null || cat /root/Caddyfile 2>/dev/null || docker exec caddy caddy list-certificates 2>/dev/null
